Fixer that changes 'a ,b' into 'a, b'.
This also changes '{a :b}' into '{a: b}', but does not touch other
uses of colons.  It does not touch other uses of whitespace.
pytree)
token)
fixer_basec
FixWsCommaTzH
    any<(not(',') any)+ ',' ((not(',') any)+ ',')* [not(',') any]>
    
cloneZ
children
SEPS
prefix
isspace)
selfZ
nodeZ
results
newZ
comma
childr
2/usr/lib64/python3.9/lib2to3/fixes/fix_ws_comma.py
	transform
FixWsComma.transformN)
__name__
__module__
__qualname__Z
explicitZ
PATTERNr
Leafr
COMMA
COLONr
__doc__r	
pgen2r
BaseFixr
<module>
